tasks.title: Defeat and restart when player falls off world
tasks.note: ALightWarriorCharacter now dies below FallDeathZ and through FellOutOfWorld. ALightWarriorGameMode schedules a level reload after failure so the run starts over. UnrealBuildTool compile passed with UE 5.8.
acceptance: falling below the arena kill plane sets health to zero
Unreal FellOutOfWorld path also defeats the player
failure reloads the current level after a short delay

tasks.title: Improve UE5 first-playable HUD
tasks.note: Reworked ALightWarriorHUD into a clearer Canvas HUD with run state, objective, timer, wells, health, active well progress, Light/Courage resource pills, optional Shadow Debt, Thunder Hammer time, controls, and center reticle. UnrealBuildTool compile passed with UE 5.8.
acceptance: HUD shows objective and run state
HUD shows health and active well progress
HUD shows Light and Courage resources
HUD shows Thunder Hammer active time

tasks.title: Create Unreal Engine 5 project shell
tasks.note: UE5 project shell and C++ production classes exist under engine/. ALightWarriorGameMode bootstraps a playable arena with floor, sacred circle, Light Wells, Thunder Hammer temple, and shadow enemies. Unreal Editor 5.8 at D:\Games\UE_5.8 compiles the module. The automated UE iteration loop (tools/ue-loop.ps1) produces screenshot evidence. Map creation remains procedural; a saved .umap has not yet been authored.
acceptance: Play-In-Editor can run an empty arena
run state reaches victory after 90 seconds and failure at zero player health

tasks.title: Implement arena movement and dash
tasks.note: UE5 character movement now uses camera-relative forward/right vectors, orbit camera yaw/pitch, tuned dash friction, and hero readability pulses. UnrealBuildTool compile passed and UE loop captures `ue5-parity-feel1`, `ue5-parity-combat1`, and `ue5-parity-well1` produced evidence.
acceptance: camera keeps player and arena readable

tasks.title: Implement light strike feedback
tasks.note: UE5 visual hit/death feedback exists and the combat-readability capture marks attack tell and hit feedback visible. Still pending production audio before this task should be marked complete.
acceptance: hit audio and VFX are present

tasks.title: Implement sacred circle expansion and shrink
tasks.note: UE5 sacred circle actor exists and now has a visible expansion pulse when combat or Light Well restoration grows the field. `ue5-parity-well1` proves objective completion and expansion payoff. Still pending a focused danger-outside-circle capture before completion.
acceptance: circle expands from successful brave action
player can tell the circle changed because of their risk

tasks.title: Implement Thunder Hammer temple
tasks.note: UE5 temple actor grants Thunder Hammer, expands the sacred circle, flashes a large activation ring, and damages nearby shadows on activation. Still pending a focused Thunder Hammer capture before completion.
acceptance: temple placement tempts the player outside safety before activation

tasks.title: Implement shadow imp and berserker enemy behaviors
tasks.note: UE5 now has Shadow Imp and Berserker archetypes with distinct scale, color, health, movement speed, attack range, windup timing, contact damage, attack tell size/color, and death burst intensity. Berserker hits knock the player back. Combat capture `ue5-enemy-archetypes1` shows distinct silhouettes and readable pressure.
